mnemonics.title: CURL Direction
mnemonics.content: Right-Hand Rule: Curl fingers in rotation direction, thumb points curl vector.

acronyms.expansion: Circulation per Unit area, Rotation, Limit
acronyms.usage: Remember curl measures local rotation effect

visualTips.visualization: Imagine tiny cubes - more vectors exiting than entering means positive divergence

analogies.analogy: Like air flowing out of a balloon (positive divergence) vs air being sucked into a vacuum (negative)
